feedback.text: I would like to see computer games protected against making games already purchased unplayable. As I have already happened several times. A great deal of games are rendered inconspicuous by switching the servers out of industry. This is also done regularly for games that do not need servers to play like a single player. And it has happened more and more frequently. I am also a signatory of the Stop Killing Videogames EU initiative that has already gathered 1.5 million signatures. Please do something against this. Dankuwel.
